summary: Investigation carded (low pri): (A) DC-steering for scarce GPUs vs hammering __any__; (B) volume-backed connect missing connecting-phase + late %. Spun out of MPI-134.
Fixed invalid maturity backlog -> idea (backlog is a legacy column, not a maturity enum value; was rendering red).

BUG observed live 2026-06-28: app shows GPU cards in the picker that it then CANNOT connect to. RTX PRO 4500 (and others) listed HIGH availability, but app create returns RunPod 400 (rejected) while the SAME card connects fine directly in the RunPod console. Suspect: app GPU->gpuTypeId/image-suffix map is missing/stale for these cards, OR the volume is DC-locked to EU-RO-1 and the card is out of stock in THAT DC specifically (stock hint is global, not per-DC). If a card is not app-createable it should be filtered/greyed in the picker, not shown as connectable. SEPARATE: 4090/5090 container image pulls were very slow this session (host-bandwidth lottery on the ~10GB pull). Both to investigate under this card.

todo -> doing (in-progress). Investigation concluded: (A) any-region retry re-fires same body with dc=null each tick -> keeps gambling on RunPod auto-placement landing on full hosts (the 7x refusal). Create path supports ephemeral+pinned-DC (remoteProxy create only rejects volume-without-DC). Volume was incidental. FIX: DC-steer any-region retry. (B) RESOLVED not-a-bug (two surfaces + fake time-est %). (C) bad-host signal already fetched+discarded in _podRuntimeStatus -> wire it. NEW 2026-06-28 'HIGH avail -> 400' bug = same KEY FINDING (optimistic available flag), image map is name-based+correct for 4500=cu124, gpuTypeId catalogue-passed, picker per-DC scoped -> NOT a stale map. User chose: ship (A) + (C).

SHIPPED (A)+(C), logic self-checked, NOT live-verified. (A) DC-steer any-region retry: js/shell.js _bestStockDcForGpu ranks dataCenters[].gpuAvailability High>Med>Low, pins body.datacenter on a refused any-region (no-volume) retry instead of re-gambling on dc=null. Ephemeral CAN be DC-pinned (create only needs DC when volumeId set). Volume connects untouched (DC-locked). (C) maintenance bad-host: remoteProxy _podRuntimeStatus now reads machine.maintenanceStart/End/Note (was discarded), surfaces `maintenance` on /remote/comfy/status; both polls (_pollRemoteReady shell + _pollEngineReady MpiSettings) early-return 'maintenance' past 30s grace -> delete Pod + clear podId + dialog, beating the 5-min watchdog. API CONFIRMED (docs.runpod.io GET /pods/{podId}) has NO pull-progress field -> stuck-pull-at-0% half of (C) is undetectable, only watchdog catches it. (B) closed earlier as not-a-bug. Self-check: scratchpad/mpi135-check.mjs PASS (DC ranking + maintenance extraction). Gotchas updated (RunPod section). NEEDS LIVE VERIFY: scarce card to trigger any-region steer; a maintenance host to trigger the bail. Card stays DOING until live-proven. Files: js/shell.js, routes/remoteProxy.js, js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiSettings/MpiSettings.js, docs/gotchas.md.
